backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining all core data types (Hospital, Test, Booking, HospitalSample, Report, AuditLog, etc.) and the application's state with migration support for a lab diagnostics platform serving patients, phlebotomists, lab admins, and super admins.
backend/migration.mo: Motoko migration module that transforms old actor state (hospitals without city/area/contact and user profiles without area) into the new schema, and initializes an empty phlebotomist-hospital assignments map.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (hospital management, add/edit hospital modals, phlebotomist assignment, etc.) to their source files, component dependencies, and test requirement IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated JSON dictionary summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and key behaviors, serving as a reference index for all pages, components, and hooks in the project.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind CSS entry point defining CSS custom properties for the design system's color tokens in both light and dark themes, including background, foreground, primary, sidebar, and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the XpertLab React app, setting the page title, favicon, theme color, viewport meta, and mounting the root div with the main.tsx module script.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React app component that configures TanStack Router with three lazy-loaded routes (/, /patient-app, /staff-app), wrapped in ErrorBoundary, ThemeProvider, and QueryClientProvider with Suspense boundaries.
frontend/src/components/admin/AddHospita: Modal dialog with a react-hook-form form for adding a new hospital, including fields for name, city, address, area, contact number, and active status.
frontend/src/components/admin/AddTestMod: Modal dialog for adding a new lab test with fields for name, code, sample type, MRP, and active status, handling duplicate-code errors from the backend.
frontend/src/components/admin/DisableTes: Alert dialog that confirms disabling a test by calling the useDisableTest mutation and showing success or error toasts.
frontend/src/components/admin/EditHospit: Modal dialog pre-populated with an existing hospital's data, allowing admins to update hospital details via the useUpdateHospital mutation.
frontend/src/components/admin/EditTestMo: Modal dialog pre-populated with an existing test's data, allowing admins to edit all test fields including the test code, with duplicate-code error handling.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginScreen: Phlebotomist portal login screen that uses Internet Identity for authentication, displaying feature highlights and a sign-in button with loading state.
frontend/src/components/auth/PatientLogi: Patient-facing login screen with Internet Identity sign-in, hero banner, feature cards, and a role error notice if a staff account is detected.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog for new users to enter their name, phone, and (for staff) role, then save the profile to the backend via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/auth/StaffLoginS: Staff portal login screen supporting Internet Identity sign-in and optional demo-mode role selection (Phlebotomist, Lab Admin, Super Admin).
frontend/src/components/demo/MockBottomN: Reusable bottom navigation bar component that renders a list of nav items with icons and highlights the active route.
frontend/src/components/demo/RolePermiss: Displays a static permissions matrix table showing which modules each role (Patient, Phlebotomist, Lab Admin, Super Admin) can access.
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: Main app shell with a sticky header logo and a floating bottom navigation bar that renders provided nav items and handles route navigation.
frontend/src/components/layout/BottomNav: Renders a fixed bottom navigation bar with dynamically resolved Lucide icons, active state styling, and optional badge counts per nav item.
frontend/src/components/layout/Notificat: Bell icon button that shows an unread count badge and toggles the NotificationDrawer when clicked.
Slide-in sheet drawer displaying a list of notifications with type icons, relative timestamps, unread indicators, and a mark-all-read action.
frontend/src/components/layout/PatientAp: Page shell for the patient-facing app with a sticky header, scrollable main content area, and a floating pill-style bottom navigation bar.
frontend/src/components/layout/RoleGuard: Wrapper component that renders children only if the user's role is in the allowed list, otherwise shows an access-denied message or a custom fallback.
frontend/src/components/layout/ShiftGuar: Auth-readiness guard for phlebotomist routes that shows a loading spinner while the actor/identity initializes and blocks unauthenticated access.
frontend/src/components/layout/StaffAppL: Staff app shell with a sticky header, optional demo-mode banner, scrollable content area, and a BottomNavigation that injects a badge count on the home-collection-queue item.
frontend/src/components/shared/DeliveryM: Modal dialog with a radio group for selecting a report delivery method (WhatsApp, Physical, Email, Hospital Pickup) before confirming.
frontend/src/components/shared/ErrorBoun: React class-based error boundary that catches render errors and displays a styled fallback UI with reload and reset options.
frontend/src/components/shared/GradientB: Reusable button component supporting primary gradient and outline variants, multiple sizes, a loading spinner state, and disabled handling.
frontend/src/components/shared/LoadingSc: Displays a full-screen loading animation with a bouncing-dots indicator and a timeout fallback that shows a 'Taking too long' message with a reload button after a configurable delay.
frontend/src/components/shared/MedicalCa: A simple styled card wrapper component that applies medical card CSS classes and optionally supports hover effects and click handlers.
frontend/src/components/shared/SampleAct: Renders role-aware action buttons (Mark Dispatched, View/Download Report, WhatsApp share, Mark Delivered) for a hospital sample based on its current status and the user's role.
frontend/src/components/shared/SampleWor: Renders a vertical step-by-step timeline of the six hospital sample workflow stages, visually distinguishing completed, current, and future stages with icons and connector lines.
frontend/src/components/shared/Searchabl: A searchable, multi-select list component for lab tests that filters by name/description, toggles selection, and displays a summary of selected tests with total price.
frontend/src/components/shared/StatusBad: Renders a color-coded pill badge for a given status string, covering booking, incident severity, home collection, and hospital sample statuses with a graceful fallback for unknown values.
frontend/src/components/shared/WhatsAppS: An alert dialog that asks the user to confirm sharing a lab report via WhatsApp, supporting a loading state and a demo mode that skips backend calls.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, invalidating dependent queries whenever the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useAuth.ts: A React Query hook that fetches the current user's role from the backend actor and returns it as a minimal UserProfile, with loading state derived from both actor and query status.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides a React context and hook for Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity persistence via AuthClient with configurable options.
frontend/src/hooks/useNotifications.ts: Custom React hook managing an in-memory notifications list with support for adding, marking as read, removing, and clearing notifications.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines TanStack Query hooks for all backend actor interactions including user profiles, tests, samples, hospitals, bookings, and phlebotomist operations.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet importing Poppins/Inter fonts, Tailwind directives, CSS custom properties for light/dark themes, and reusable component utility classes.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a single `cn` utility function that merges Tailwind class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminAttendance: Admin page displaying currently active staff shifts with live elapsed-time tracking and a filterable shift history list.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminBookingsPa: Admin page for viewing and managing all bookings with search and status filter (pending/confirmed/completed/canceled). Displays booking cards with status badges and allows status updates via mutation.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminHospitalSa: Admin page for managing hospital samples with filtering by search and delivery method. Supports billing edits, dispatching, delivery confirmation, and WhatsApp delivery workflows via dialogs and mutations.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AdminReportsPag: Admin page listing all lab reports with search by ID or booking ID, sorted by timestamp. Provides view and download actions for each report PDF and a navigation button to upload new reports.
frontend/src/pages/admin/AuditLogsPage.t: Admin page displaying audit log entries with filtering by status (success/rejected/suspicious) and search. Renders log details with icons, badges, and formatted timestamps, falling back to mock data if the backend query fails.
Admin form page for creating a health camp with name, date, and location fields, persisting the result to localStorage. On success, displays the generated camp ID with a copyable QR code placeholder and camp details summary.
frontend/src/pages/admin/HospitalDetails: Displays details for a specific hospital and allows super admins to assign or remove phlebotomists via a search panel and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/admin/HospitalManagem: Lists all hospitals with search and pagination, and allows super admins to add, edit, or disable hospitals via modals and confirmation dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/admin/IncidentsPage.t: Displays a filterable list of reported incidents with severity badges, timestamps, reporter info, and optional photos.
frontend/src/pages/admin/SecurityLogsPag: Shows security event logs with filtering by user ID and event type, and allows admins to reset device bindings via a confirmation dialog.
frontend/src/pages/admin/TestManagementP: Manages lab tests with search, pagination, status toggling, CSV bulk upload, and modals for adding, editing, and disabling tests.
frontend/src/pages/admin/UploadReportPag: Admin page for uploading PDF lab reports, requiring a booking ID, patient ID, and a PDF file under 10MB, with upload progress tracking and success/error feedback via toasts.
frontend/src/pages/AppSelectorPage.tsx: Landing page presenting portal selection cards (Patient App and Staff App) with navigation to their respective routes.
frontend/src/pages/demo/RBACDemoPage.tsx: Demo page that visualizes Role-Based Access Control by letting users switch between app roles (patient, phlebotomist, labAdmin, superAdmin) and see their navigation items and permissions matrix.
Patient-facing page for browsing and selecting lab tests with search/filter, displaying price totals, and navigating to slot selection with the chosen tests.
frontend/src/pages/patient/HomeCollectio: Multi-step patient page for requesting home sample collection, allowing address entry (with GPS support), test selection, time slot picking, and submission via API mutation.
frontend/src/pages/patient/MyBookingsPag: Displays a patient's lab test bookings sorted by date, showing test names, status badges, and time slots, with a prompt to book if none exist.
frontend/src/pages/patient/MyHomeCollect: Displays a patient's home collection requests sorted by date, showing address, selected tests, status badges, and time slots, with a prompt to request if none exist.
frontend/src/pages/patient/MyHospitalSam: Displays a patient's hospital lab samples fetched by phone number, supporting demo mode, with expandable cards showing status badges and a workflow timeline.
Static placeholder page showing empty health vitals (blood pressure, blood glucose) with a message that vitals will appear once recorded by a phlebotomist.
frontend/src/pages/patient/PatientHomePa: Patient home screen displaying a welcome banner, quick-action grid for booking tests/home collection/reports/vitals, and shortcuts to bookings and home collections.
frontend/src/pages/patient/ProfilePage.t: User profile page showing identity, role badge, and assigned hospitals; supports logout, and allows super admins to remove phlebotomists from hospitals with a reason.
frontend/src/pages/patient/ReportsPage.t: Fetches and lists the patient's lab reports sorted by date, with view and download links for each report file.
frontend/src/pages/patient/SlotSelection: Allows patients to select a time slot for their chosen tests and confirm a booking, displaying a summary of selected tests and total price.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/AddHospi: A form page for phlebotomists to create hospital samples, allowing selection of an assigned hospital, patient details, tests, discount, and payment mode, with support for both demo and live backend modes.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/Attendan: Displays a phlebotomist's daily shift summary (samples, cash, UPI, pending amounts) with start/end shift actions and a locked post-shift summary view.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/HomeColl: Shows a phlebotomist's queue of home collection visits for the day, supporting status transitions (Assigned → En Route → Sample Collected → Completed) and Google Maps navigation, with a daily overview card.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/MyHospit: Lists all hospital samples collected by the phlebotomist with expandable workflow timelines and action controls for dispatching, delivering, or confirming WhatsApp delivery, supporting both demo and live modes.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/Phleboto: An enhanced attendance page that requires GPS location verification and a selfie capture before starting or ending a shift, and displays today's collection summary statistics.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/RecordVi: A tabbed form page for phlebotomists to record blood pressure (systolic, diastolic, pulse) and blood glucose readings, using mutation hooks to submit each reading.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/ScanCamp: A QR code scanner page for phlebotomists to scan camp QR codes for check-in logging, displaying a live camera preview with scan results and controls.
frontend/src/pages/phlebotomist/TaskQueu: Displays a refreshable task queue for phlebotomists showing pending hospital bookings and assigned home collection requests fetched via query hooks.
frontend/src/pages/staff/SubmitIncidentP: A form page for staff to submit incident reports with severity selection, description, and optional photo upload, showing a success state after submission.
frontend/src/PatientApp.tsx: Patient-facing app shell that handles Internet Identity authentication, profile setup modal, and client-side routing across all patient pages (home, book test, collections, reports, vitals, profile) via an onNavigate prop pattern.
frontend/src/StaffApp.tsx: Root component for the staff-facing app that handles authentication, role detection, and lazy-loads all staff pages (phlebotomist, lab admin, super admin) with role-based navigation.
frontend/src/types/models.ts: Defines core TypeScript interfaces and types for the XpertLab app including user roles, test models, home collection requests, hospital samples, and sample/delivery status enums.
frontend/src/utils/deliveryHelpers.ts: Utility functions that map SampleStatus and DeliveryMethod enum values to display colors, human-readable descriptions, and labels.
frontend/src/utils/demoData.ts: Provides demo mode utilities using localStorage to manage mock hospital samples and home collection records, including CRUD helpers and seed data for offline/demo usage.
frontend/src/utils/deviceFingerprint.ts: Provides device fingerprinting utilities: generates/persists a UUID-based device ID in localStorage, parses the user agent for OS and browser info, and combines them into a single fingerprint object.
frontend/src/utils/formatters.ts: Collection of formatting helpers for currency (INR), dates, times, relative time strings, unique ID generation, and a premium two-line time display for home collection cards.
frontend/src/utils/geoHelpers.ts: GPS validation utilities including accuracy threshold checks, Haversine distance calculation, mock/spoofed location detection, geofence boundary checks, and implausible speed-jump detection.
frontend/src/utils/roleConfig.ts: Defines the navigation item configuration (label, path, icon) for each app role (patient, phlebotomist, labAdmin, superAdmin) as a typed record.
frontend/src/utils/roleHelpers.ts: Provides boolean role-check helper functions and a display-name formatter for the AppRole type.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utilities for reading URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, persisting them to sessionStorage, and cleaning sensitive params from the URL bar without a page reload.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration extending the default theme with custom fonts (Poppins/Inter), OKLCH-based design-token colors, border radii, box shadows, brand gradients, and keyframe animations.
project_state.json: Tracks the overall project state including schema version, architectural notes, known issues, and a registry of existing and in-progress features for the Hospital Management System.
